name: chirpstack-api
documentation:
# chirpstack-api

ChirpStack gRPC API message and service wrappers for Python.

## Install

```sh
pip install chirpstack-api
```

## Usage

All messages, services, constants, etc. are auto-generated from the ChirpStack
protobuf definitions. The result is that this package structure matches that 
of the protobuf definitions.

The protobuf definitions can be found here:
[https://github.com/chirpstack/chirpstack/tree/master/api/proto](https://github.com/chirpstack/chirpstack/tree/master/api/proto)

## Links

* [`chirpstack-api` Python package page](https://pypi.org/project/chirpstack-api/)
* [ChirpStack documentation](https://www.chirpstack.io/)
* [Code examples](https://www.chirpstack.io/docs/chirpstack/api/python-examples.html)

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.gateway_pb2_grpc.GatewayServiceServicer.GetDutyCycleMetrics
documentation:
GetDutyCycleMetrics returns the duty-cycle metrics.
Note that only the last 2 hours of data are stored. Currently only per minute aggregation is available.
GatewayService is the service providing API methods for managing gateways.

classes.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceStub
documentation: DeviceService is the service providing API methods for managing devices.

classes.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.Get
documentation: Get returns the device for the given DevEUI.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.Delete
documentation: Delete the device with the given DevEUI.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.GetKeys
documentation: Get the device-keys for the given DevEUI.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.DeleteKeys
documentation: Delete the device-keys for the given DevEUI.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.FlushDevNonces
documentation: FlushDevNonces flushes the OTAA device nonces.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.Activate
documentation:
Activate (re)activates the device with the given parameters (for ABP or for
importing OTAA activations).

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.GetActivation
documentation:
GetActivation returns the current activation details of the device (OTAA or
ABP).

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.GetRandomDevAddr
documentation:
GetRandomDevAddr returns a random DevAddr taking the NwkID prefix into
account.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.GetMetrics
documentation:
GetMetrics returns the device metrics.
Note that this requires a device-profile with codec and measurements
configured.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.GetLinkMetrics
documentation:
GetLinkMetrics returns the device link metrics.
This includes uplinks, downlinks, RSSI, SNR, etc...

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.Enqueue
documentation: Enqueue adds the given item to the downlink queue.

methods.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceServiceServicer.GetNextFCntDown
documentation:
GetNextFCntDown returns the next FCntDown to use for enqueing encrypted
downlinks. The difference with the DeviceActivation f_cont_down is that
this method takes potential existing queue-items into account.
DeviceService is the service providing API methods for managing devices.

classes.name: chirpstack_api.api.device_pb2_grpc.DeviceService
documentation: DeviceService is the service providing API methods for managing devices.
This class is part of an EXPERIMENTAL API.
